sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45760" key="e)fialtei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφῐαλτ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a herb ( <sense id="n45760.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐφιαλτία</ref> </xr>) used as a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preventive of nightmare</tr_>, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:162" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">162</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐφιαλτιον</foreign> cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
